generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor networks for data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data collected from the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimationAlgorithm, OptimizationAlgorithm
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric models (e.g., CAD for structural dimensions)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationAlgorithm
]

instance DynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical models (e.g., differential equations for dynamic behavior)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationAlgorithm
]

instance CADSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design (CAD) software for geometric modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring systems for performance assessment"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SimulationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Specialized algorithms for simulation and prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction services to model the Physical Twin's behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms to identify anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation techniques for system state determination"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services to improve system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyOptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control functions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated behavior of the Physical Twin under current conditions"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future behavior of the Physical Twin"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations based on monitoring data"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing system performance"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detected by fault detection algorithms"
]

instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current system state determined by state estimation"
]

instance EfficiencyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized efficiency parameters for system improvement"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to Physical Twin based on supervisory control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
